hooks.prompt: Before exploring a new site, verify the URL is well-formed and uses HTTPS. If the URL uses HTTP, warn the user that credentials may be exposed over an unencrypted connection and ask if they want to proceed.

Recording has stopped and skills have been generated. Suggest the user validate the new skills by saying 'validate skills' or running the skill-validator agent. Briefly mention how many skills were generated if that info is available in the tool output.
Before starting a recording, verify there is an active explore session. If the user hasn't explored a site yet, remind them to run /schrute:explore first.
